prompt: A photo-realistic portrait of a young ancient Asian man with long black hair, wearing traditional Hanfu robes in muted gray tones. The man is standing in the middle of the image, with his upper body facing the viewer. He has a calm, neutral expression and is looking directly at the camera. His long straight black hair is neatly tied back with a simple ancient hairpiece, with a few strands framing his face. The background is softly blurred, appearing to be an outdoor ancient garden setting with trees, greenery, and subtle traditional architectural elements. The lighting is soft and natural, highlighting his refined facial features, the smooth texture of his hair, and the layered fabric of his robes. The image has a serene, elegant, and contemplative atmosphere, with the man's body slightly angled toward the left side of the frame.
